title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Corgi, founded by Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan at age 25, raised $108M Series A to rebuild the insurance industry from the ground up rather than modernize existing carriers. The founders argue that outsider perspectives, relentless execution, and ambitious goal-setting create defensible moats that insiders cannot replicate, with Corgi projected to reach several hundred million ARR.
